---
title: "Levente Kaszai"
subtitle: "Hungarian Basketball Analytics"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

## About

I analyze Hungarian basketball through the lens of modern analytics.
My work focuses on uncovering what actually drives winning in the
Hungarian league — and where it diverges from NBA trends.

## Work

- [Four Factors Analysis (2022-2025)](four_factors_1.qmd) —
  What drives winning in Hungarian basketball?

- [Scoring Efficiency (2022-2025)](scoring_efficiency.qmd) —
  eFG%, TS%, and the volume-efficiency tradeoff in Hungarian basketball.

- [Játékritmus & Hatékonyság (2022-2025)](pace_efficiency.qmd) —
  Miért nem elég a pontozás? A per-100 szállítás logikája és a tempó szerepe.

## Contact

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/levente-kaszai-9488bb156) · [Email](mailto:leventekaszai@gmail.com)
